name: Ubiquiti Wave AP Micro
title: Ubiquiti Wave AP Micro
short_description: 60 GHz PtMP Access Point, 5 GHz backup radio, 5Gbps total throughput, 1x 2.5 GbE Port, 2.5 GbE PoE adapter included
description: 60 GHz PtMP Access Point, 5 GHz backup radio, 5Gbps total throughput, 1x 2.5 GbE Port, 2.5 GbE PoE adapter included

detailed_description.heading: 60 GHz PtMP Access Point
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Wave AP Micro, with the model manufacture part number Wave-AP-Micro, is a highly capable outdoor access point that operates within the 60 GHz frequency band, specifically designed for point-to-multipoint (PtMP) applications. It features a compact design, measuring 284 x 156 x 76 mm and weighing 1.3 kg. The device is constructed from durable materials including an aluminum alloy and UV stabilized polycarbonate, ensuring it can withstand harsh environmental conditions with a weatherproofing rating of IPX6.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text: 5 GHz backup radio, 90° sector coverage, Link range: up to 1 km with Wave Pico, Link range: up to 4 km with Wave Nano, Link range: up to 6 km with Wave Pro, Link range: up to 6 km with Wave Long Range, Bridge mode support, Integrated GPS antenna, Link planning support via ISP Design Center

detailed_description.heading: Performance
detailed_description.text: This access point is equipped with advanced networking capabilities, including a 1/2.5 GbE RJ45 port that supports both standard Ethernet and Power over Ethernet (PoE) inputs. It has a quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor running at 1.4 GHz, accompanied by 512 MB DDR3L memory, which facilitates robust performance and multitasking capabilities. For extended coverage, the Wave AP Micro can connect up to 15 client stations, delivering a total throughput of 5 Gbps (2.5 Gbps duplex). It supports a range of up to 6 km when paired with other devices like the Wave Pro or Wave Long-Range, and up to 4 km with the Wave Nano.

detailed_description.heading: 90° Sector Coverage
detailed_description.text: The 90° sector coverage of the Ubiquiti Wave AP Micro is particularly valuable for point-to-multipoint (PtMP) applications where broad, consistent coverage is required over a specific area. This wide beamwidth ensures that a single Wave AP Micro unit can effectively cover large open spaces without the need for additional access points. Such coverage is ideal for outdoor environments like campuses, parks, or public squares, where users move within a wide area and seamless connectivity is crucial.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Network Control
detailed_description.text: Furthermore, the device includes a 5 GHz backup radio based on the Wi-Fi 6 standard to ensure continuous connectivity and comes with integrated GPS for precise location tracking. The system's setup and management are simplified through Bluetooth connectivity and can be handled via Ubiquiti's UISP mobile app. This combination of advanced hardware and versatile software features makes the Wave AP Micro an ideal solution for delivering high-speed internet in a variety of outdoor settings, from residential to commercial locations where reliable, high-capacity wireless connections are critical. Simply organize your clients' plans, setup billing and invoicing, and grow your customer base. UISP application allows viewing network topology, advanced data analytics, quickly set up devices and manage them on the go with a powerful mobile app.
